_comment: Example .aify-graph/functionality.json for a typical Laravel app. Copy to .aify-graph/functionality.json in your Laravel repo and edit. Anchors validate against the code graph at brief-generation time — stale anchors surface on the brief's TRUST line.

features.label: Authentication & session
features.description: Login, logout, password reset, session lifecycle. Spans web routes, AuthController, FormRequests, and the User model.

features.label: Billing & subscriptions
features.description: Stripe integration via Cashier. Subscription plans, webhooks, invoices.

features.label: Background jobs
features.description: Queued jobs for email delivery, report generation, third-party sync. Dispatched via Bus::dispatch.

features.label: Public REST API v1
features.description: Versioned external-facing API. Sanctum-authenticated. Uses API resources for serialization.
